INT. BRITISH MUSEUM BASEMENT WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

EXT. QUICKSAND, BURIAL GROUND - NIGHT
The High Priest and a dozen black and red turbaned men run

hunting them down, picking them off one-by-one, relentless.
